game_name: Zelda II: The Adventure of Link

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Magic System
special_mechanics.description: Link casts magic spells with a magic meter that depletes based on spell type

special_mechanics.name: Experience & Leveling
special_mechanics.description: Link gains experience points to upgrade Attack, Magic, and Life attributes up to 7 levels above starting point

special_mechanics.name: Combat System
special_mechanics.description: Strategic proximity-based combat with sword attacks; some enemies drain Link's experience points

tier_notes: Tier 1 designation based on available sources: Data Crystal (technical ROM documentation), TCRF (reverse-engineering notes), and Wikipedia (gameplay mechanics). No precise movement physics values (velocities, accelerations, gravity constants) are documented in any source. ROM addresses provided in Data Crystal only reference lives counter (0x1C369) and overworld terrain flag (0x72E), not movement physics. Game features side-scrolling platformer mechanics but exact physics parameters remain undocumented in public sources.
sources_used: datacrystal.tcrf.net - Zelda II ROM map and technical documentation
The Cutting Room Floor - TCRF game analysis and developer notes
Wikipedia - Zelda II gameplay mechanics and feature descriptions
